files.complete_text:
A NEW YEAR'S PRAYER FOR 1921

L. Lula Greene Richards

Father who art in Heaven,
    Hallowed be Thy name!
As Jesus taught the humble
    Who to His presence came,
Joseph Thy modern Prophet
    Hath taught Thy Saints to pray,
And thus we would approach Thee
    On this great New Year's day.

We thank Thee that Thy Kingdom
    Hath come on earth again,
With Prophets and Apostles,
    Devout and holy men.
Come Jesus, Heaven's Kingdom
    In light and power display,
Bring Thou with all its glory
    A New Eternal Day!
files.title: A NEW YEAR'S PRAYER FOR 1921
files.author: L. Lula Greene Richards
files.notes: Found complete poem on page 4 of PDF. The file was severely truncated, containing only a fragment that appears to be from a different context.

This file contains only lesson headers/titles that appear to be fragments from a table of contents or section dividers. The actual Guide Lessons for March content is not present in the provided PDF pages, which only show February lessons and anti-tobacco content. This appears to be a header artifact with no substantive article content.
